park_name: Black Point Caravan & Camping Ground Yorke Peninsula SA

reviews.review_text: A lovely, tidy small park on the beach. Excellent facilities, evident that it is well cared for. I booked a powered site which was spacious enough for an RV plus awning and outdoor set up. Very happy to bring the doggos as well.

I spent 3 nights at Black Point Caravan Park and really enjoyed the camping and the facilities. Caravan Park is great for those looking for a calm and relaxing place away from large, crowded and bustling Caravan Parks.
Great seaside spot for a rest altho quite Widdy in January.
Great camping ground. A hidden gem

Outstanding beach area.
Lovely bay for fishing 🎣
I've been coming to Black Point my whole life and it's changed a lot, some for the better and some not. Lots of noisy jetskis in summer.
Small caravan park, steep stars required to access beach ⛱️ lovely views , 🚻separate to showers 🚿 which require a code to enter .Small laundry with washer & dryer , very pleasant
A small park on a wonderful waterfront. Our dog lived swimming here. Good amenities and views if you can score the beachfront sites.
Nice little park but absolutely nothing except beach and amenities block,  a bit$$$ for what it is... people come for the fishing

Great little caravan park, only 13 sites. New amenities block, with showers separate to the toilets. Washer and dryer. Camp kitchen with gas cook top. No dump point. Our site was sea facing with nearby beach access.
Such a beautiful place to camp and watch the sun come up. Fishing canoeing or swimming take your pick just relax and see why the Pelicans love it so much. ❤️😊
we were the only camper when we went so really enjoyed how nice and quiet it was. great view, nice walk down the beach. powered sites and water points are beach front. Restrooms were clean.
Nice spot and good views managed a few fish from the beach
But unfortunately now council controlled has increased by 42% so we can't afford to holiday their now.
